originalTitle: Senegal government alleges corruption over Afcon
title: Senegal government alleges corruption over Afcon

title: Celebrations in Morocco but devastation in Senegal after Afcon decision

title: Social media making young people less happy, report finds

originalTitle: US intelligence agencies not expecting China to invade Taiwan in 2027
title: US intelligence agencies not expecting China to invade Taiwan in 2027

title: Iran executes three convicted of killing police in recent pre-war unrest
content: Those executed were allegedly involved in the killing of two law enforcement personnel.

title: Even when they win it still ends in defeat - Spurs' season summed up
